items.title: Investigate Dream degradation: RunTimeout clamped to 6h hard max
items.description: Dream degraded overnight. The morning handoff should produce a tracked repair packet instead of silently carrying the failure forward.
items.why_now: Dream degraded overnight. The morning handoff should produce a tracked repair packet instead of silently carrying the failure forward.
items.morning_command: ao rpi phased "Investigate Dream degradation: RunTimeout clamped to 6h hard max"
